We Hosted The Organızatıon Commıttee Of The 11th Global Waqf Conference

15.09.2023

Ibn Haldun University hosted the 11th Global Foundation Conference Committee.

The 11th Global Waqf Conference has been held in Istanbul as hybrid. Our rector Prof. Atilla Arkan welcomed the organization committee after the completion of the event successfully, where approximately 120 participants from 26 countries took part.

The outcomes of the 11th Global Waqf Conference and its impact on the participating countries were evaluated at the meeting. In addition, cooperation opportunities on different projects were discussed among the members of the organizing committee.
